articles.title: Uniswap Token $UNI Skyrockets 50% on Proposal to Reward Staked Holders
articles.description: The price of the native token of leading decentralized cryptocurrency exchange Uniswap ($UNI) has surged by nearly 50% over the last 24-hour period over a recently filed proposal to “strengthen and invigorate” Uniswap’s governance and reward UNI token holders. The proposal, submitted by the Uniswap Foundation’s governance lead Erin Koen, would reward UNI token holders […]
